title: Bridge Essay: Precision control for a flexible body representation.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Precision, control, for, a, flexible.

**Precision control for aflexible body representation.** — Neurosci Biobehav Rev. PMID: 34736884. DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2021.10.023. Adaptive body representation requires the continuous integration of multisensory inputs within aflexible 'body model' in the brain. The present review evaluates the idea that this flexibility is augmented by the contextual modulation of sensory processing 'top-down'; which can be described as precision control within predictive coding formulations of Bayesian inference.
